titleStmt.title: SII 22.337: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 337. (A.R. No. 337 of 1906) NORTH ARCOT DISTRICT, WALAJAPET TALUK, TIRUMĀLPURAM. RUINED VISHṆU TEMPLE—ON THE SAME WALL. PARAK. RĀJĒNDRA-CHŌḶADĒVA I—3rd YEAR (A.D. 1014-15)

summary.p: The inscription is damaged. It seems to record an endowment of 21 kaḻañju of gold to the temple at Gōvindapāḍi in Vallanāḍu by Kōḍaṉ Nambaṉ [Na]ttagaḍi alias Uttamaśōḻa Brahma-Vaḷavarājaṉ of Aruvēḷūr alias Vikrama[śiṅga]-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Nenmali-nāḍu a sub-division of Arumoḻidēvavaḷanāḍu in Śōḻamaṇḍalam for the feeding of Śrīvaishṇavas on all the 9 days of the festival in Chittirai month in the temple. With this amount the temple is stated to have purchased tax-free, a piece of land from the Sabhā of Arumoḻidēva-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Valla-nādu. Mention is made at the end of the record, of the Sabhā of Parakulāntaka-chaturvēdimaṅgalam, the relevency of which is not clear.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . kopparakeśaripanmarāna [śrī] Irājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 3Āvatu jayaṅkoṇṭa coḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu śrī kovin=tapāṭi ṉiṉṟaruḷiya perumāṉaṭikaḷ Āḻvār cittirait
tiruviḻā Oṉpatu nāḷum śrī vaiyiṣṇavarai perun tiruvamirtu ceytaruḷavum tiruveṅkaṭa m Aṭapperuvattikku U ḻakkaricikkum śrīcoḻa maṇṭalattu Arumoḻitevavaḷanāṭṭu neṉmalināṭṭu Aruve
ḷūrākiya vikkirama[ śiṅka] śatuppetimaṅkalattuṭai koṭaṉ nampaṉ nattakaṭiāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻa Āṉa Uttamacoḻabrahma vaḷava rājaṉ śrī kovin=tapāṭi devar śrī paṇṭārattu vaitta po
ṉ [ tanma] kaṭṭaḷai tuḷainiṟai Irupattoru kaḻañcu Ippoṉ Irupattoru kaḻañcum jayaṅkoṇṭacoḻamaṇṭalattu tāmarkkoṭṭattu vallanāṭṭu śrī Aru moḻiteva śaturvetimaṅkala
ttu sabhaiyom Ittevar dravviyamum Iṟaitdravviyamum Ākak koṇṭu Ittevarkku nāṅkaḷ candrādittavar Iṟaiyiliyāka viṟṟukkuṭukkiṟa nilamāvatu Eṅkaḷūr
śrī rājarājapereri kiḻ śrī rājarājavatikku kiḻakku śrī Arumoḻiteva vāykkālukku vaṭakku munṟāṅkaṇṇāṟṟu Aiñcām catirattu Eṭṭumāvil kiḻakkaṭaiya nāṉku mā nilamum Iv
mukkāṇiyum Iṅke
nālām catirattum E
ṭṭu māvil vaṭameṟkkaṭai
ya Iraṇṭu mā Araikkāṇikiḻa
raiyum Inilattil kiḻaime
ṟkkaṭaiya muṉtirikai kiḻ Araiyum
Ulakaḷanta kolāl kuḻi Iraṇṭa
māviṟai Uḷpaṭṭa Epperpaṭṭa cilliṟai
lappiṟaiyum kāttu melnirum kiḻnirum Itu
tukku Uriyavaṇṇamum peṟuvatākavum candrādityava
rai Iṟaiili viṟṟu ril Uḻutu
taṭu kuṭi A Iṟaiyu
ṭṭātārākavum Irunā
kkaṭṭuvomākavum Ipparicaṉṟi
kku Iṭaivila
ṅki Iṟaikāṭ
ṭinārai perppoṉ
śrī vayiṣṇavarey taṉ
mātaṉa Uḷḷiṭṭu tāṉ veṇ
ṭu kovukku perppoṉ Aiṅkaḻa
ñcu poṉ maṉṟapeṟuvarkaḷāka
vum maṉṟupāṭu Iṟuttum Iṟaikā
ṭṭa Ipparicu śilālekhai
ceytukuṭuttom śrī kovintapāṭi ni
ṉṟaruḷina perumānaṭikaḷukku muṟco
llappaṭṭa parakulāṉtaka caturve
timaṅkalattu sabhaiyom I
tukku vakutam paṇṇinār keṅkaiiṭaikumari
Iṭaiceytār ceyta pāvattil paṭuvār Ippaṭi ca(v)bhai pa
ṇippa kuṟiuḷḷiruntu Eḻutineṉ Ivūr madhyastaṉ Eṭṭi
kuṟi tiṇṭaṉ maṇiyanāṉa parakulāntaka brahmapriyaneṉ Ivai Eṉ neḻuttu
Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ paṅkanūr Iḷaiya mātavakiramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Āsūriviṣṇu
kramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ vaṅkipuṟattu vāmanakramavittaneṉ Ippaṭi Aṟiveṉ Araṅka nā
vasattanā
rāyaṇakramavi
ttaneṉ
Itu śrī va
yiṣṇava ra
kṣai .
Digital edition of SII 22.337 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
